Video.summary: It is Mark Peterson’s third day in Mexico hunting for a Mexican Texanus Whitetail. After bagging two big bucks in just two days with his new Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC, he is now moving to a new farm where a giant 12-point buck has often been seen in the southeast corner of the property. It’s the coldest day since he arrived, which typically means the deer will be more active. He is thrilled at the prospect of what could be the best day yet. If everything goes well, they will spend the evening - hunting hogs from the high rack.
Video.title: "North American Deer Slam - Last Day In Mexico"

Image.alt: "North American Deer Slam - Last Day In Mexico"
"North American Deer Slam - Last Day In Mexico"
"North American Deer Slam - Last Day In Mexico"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade, Ryan and Bearcub take on the midwest! After some tough hunting, the group is able to make a move to get in position on a BIG midwestern gobbler! Bearcub was able to harvest him after working the bird for almost 45 minutes! Slade and Ryan also do some Pre-Deer season work, and establish where the fall food-plots will be!
Video.title: "Missouri Turkey Tour!!"

Video.summary: Mark is wrapping up his Argentina hunt and heading to Entre Rios to track down the final two birds on his list: the Rock Pigeon and the Eared Dove. This area is home to over 10 million birds, making it a prime hunting ground. With flocks of pigeons and doves filling the skies, Mark is set for a fast-paced, action-packed finish to his hunt—a perfect end to an unforgettable adventure.
Video.title: "South America Upland Slam - Entre Rios"

Video.summary: He’s the original fishing coach. From the helm of one of the most iconic inshore shows ever made, Captain C.A. Richardson has taught a generation how to fish. This documentary dives into his story. The man, the mission, and the waters that made him who he is.
Video.title: "CA"

Video.summary: Cable is a huge supporter of Texas Hunting and everything Teas Trophy Hunters. We are blessed to spend a few days with hum at the beautiful Saddle Creek Ranch in Brady Texas. Greg has a tight management plan and we are glad we got to enjoy his ranch with him and his team.
Video.title: "Cable Smith"

Video.summary: WE join Bobby Falkenberg as he joins Bret Ferguson from Double T Outfitters. Bobby is an avid outdoorsman, judge, and father of 5. Bret manages 30,000 acres in Ozona TX, the knowledge he has of every inch of this amazing low fence ranch is remarkable. Bobby has an action packed 2 day hunt.
Video.title: "Double T Outfitters"

Video.summary: Phillip and Drake hunt with friends Michael and Adam Reinbott during the opening week of Turkey Season in Tennessee. The gobblers are on fire and putting on a show.
Video.title: "3 Turkeys In 2 Days | Tennessee Opener" (Broke)

Video.summary: In part 2 of the British episodes, Andy visits the majestic land of Scotland. Here he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette. He hunts ‘monarch’ stags and goes into the Atlantic waters to find some of the freshest shellfish on the planet which he, and Mike Robinson cook and eat. Concluding the British episodes in a place as wild as Scotland really sets the tone for the series.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 2"

Video.summary: We were honored to be a part of the Gold Star Youth Outdoors Turkey Hunt at Iron Horse Farms in Alabama. Cole Barthel and Bryan Brown were able to get Charlie Willington his first turkey. Be sure to check out Gold Star Youth Outdoors and Iron Horse Farms.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Gold Star Youth Turkey"

Video.summary: With Montana in the rearview mirror the Flylords team crosses over into Idaho. In this leg of the trip they hit Blue-Ribbon trout waters with the folks from Henrys Fork Anglers and Silver Creek Outfitters. They also have a chance to sit down with the owners of these operations and hear what these shops and fly fishing mean to them. Before they hit the road to Utah the crew joins in on another conservation event at Payette Brewing Company.
Video.title: "SIGHT Casting RISING Trout in IDAHO"

Video.summary: It’s the final leg of the Fly Shop Tour and what better way to end it than with a trip down to see the crew at Fly Fish Food. We learn the unique story of how owners Clark “Cheech” Pierce & Curtis Fry started their shop and spend some time chasing hungry Cutthroat. Wrapping it all up the team puts on the final conservation event of the season with Fly Fish Food and Fish For Garbage, as well as spending some time behind the oars on the Green River with crew at Western Rivers Fly Shop.
Video.title: "The END of our 2500 Mile Road Trip"

Image.alt: "The END of our 2500 Mile Road Trip"
"The END of our 2500 Mile Road Trip"
"The END of our 2500 Mile Road Trip"

Video.summary: We kick off Season 2 in Tennessee where we stop in Nashville, Townsend, and Johnson City!!
Video.title: "Traveling Over 2,000 Miles to Fish HERE!"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through the mountains of western North Carolina, where we stop in Asheville and Cashiers!!
Video.title: "Dry Fly Fishing HEAVEN (Wild Trout)"

Video.summary: It's turkey time and The Bearded Buck crew is going on a tour! Starting in Florida, Jerry and Austin are hunting Osceolas with Jeff Budz. From there, Jerry and Cud are headed out to hunt with our good friend, Ron Kendra, in his home state of Virginia. To finish things off, Jerry is meeting up with good friends, David "Bunch" Hale and Dan Thurston, in Kansas.
Video.title: The - "Annual Turkey Tour"

Video.summary: We’re headed to the Midwest for a December waterfowl grind. First stop: Kansas, chasing ducks with the crew from Dirty’s Outerwear. Then Cole Barthel jumps south to Oklahoma to squeeze in one more hunt before Christmas break.
Video.title: "Covered Up In Ducks"

Video.summary: For the first time in history, the World English Sporting Clays Championship was held in the United States at the incredible M&M Hunting Preserve owned by the Matarese family in New Jersey. Watch as Winchester’s best shooters vie for Gold as they compete against over 2,500 shooters and 17 countries. We’ll also join the Kids and Clays foundation in Florida as they host an event that will most certainly touch your soul.
Video.title: "Clays With Purpose"

Video.summary: Whether you're hunting 10 acres or 1,000, how you handle boundaries, buck movement, and communication with neighboring hunters can make or break your season. The team shares real-world scenarios and proven strategies to foster cooperation, avoid conflict, and build relationships that lead to better deer hunting for everyone.
Video.title: "Love Thy Neighbor"

Video.summary: This week we are rolling along side the crew from Double T Outfitters. Management plays a huge role in every outfitters success every year. Bret and his team have a strong management plan in place and these guys had a blast with a group of out of state hunters.
Video.title: "Double T Outfitters"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man Season 3, Slade puts in some early summer farm work to Ensure his target bucks are well fed! Slade also Talks about his Target buck for the year, "Pope"! Slade is laying the trap early in hopes "Pope" makes a mistake early!
Video.title: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Image.alt: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade does more summer food plot prep in hopes "Pope" will make an appearance! With Rain on the way Slade is able to disk and seed his "Pope" Summer spot!
Video.title: "The Plan for "POPE"!"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man Season 3, Slade and the crew head north to scout out, plan, and put in the plots to lay the groundwork for this falls hunting season in the Midwest!
Video.title: "Heading North, Missouri Food Plot Prep"

Video.summary: Slade and the old Trained Assassins crew are headed back to Montrose in pursuit of a big elk. The conditions are not favorable but the crew is sticking it out!
Video.title: "Montrose Elk Pt. 1"

Video.summary: LBP Spotlights West End Boatworks and goes offshore fishing.
Video.title: "West End Boatworks"

Video.summary: Meet Ryan, a seasoned St. Petersburg guide, fighting tides, time, and the last great tarpon run of the season.
Video.title: "Ryan Harrington"

Video.summary: Meet Captain Lionel James — a respected Destin, Florida guide known for his upbeat personality, strong community ties, and love for fitness when he’s not on the water.
Video.title: "Lionel James"

Video.summary: With Meredith McCord halfway around the world, Capt. Justin Leake gives show producer Chris Hermans his first shot at landing a tarpon after filming them for 9 seasons. Does art imitate life?
Video.title: "Tarpon Producer"

Video.summary: Dan Cabela explores the challenges and research behind living with Africa’s most secretive predator - the Leopard.
Video.title: "Stealthy Predators And Ancient Tribes"

Video.summary: Dan Cabela explores the model for community conservation in the Zambezi Delta of Mozambique, and responsibly harvests a Cape Buffalo bull on their behalf.
Video.title: "A Community Of Conservationists"

Video.summary: Dan Cabela learns about the recovery of an icon and the role that utilization has played in bringing a species back from the brink - the American Bison.
Video.title: "Return Of An Icon"

Video.summary: Jared's teams up with long time friend and fellow guide, Capt. Greg Dini, to conquer the patch reef.
Video.title: "Mutton Mania"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Rich's son Reed, who takes the wheel and directs the team into some amazing early morning baby tarpon fishing in the Everglades.
Video.title: "Baby Tarpon With Captain Reed"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor take Hunter Smallback into the Everglades for some snook fishing, and the action really heats up when some hungry Lemon sharks crash the party.
Video.title: "Combat Fishing With Hunter Smallback"

Video.summary: Denise Sanchez was awarded a hunt at G2 following our Hunters Extravaganza drawings. Its great to get to spend time on the ranch with new members of TTHA. Denise gets familiar with a giant and learns about new technology while on this hunt.
Video.title: "A Newfound Passion"

Video.summary: We find ourselves fishing with Troy from Lonestar Beer. Not only is Troy a great friend he is also a big supporter of Hunters Extravaganza. We get to catch up in the offseason and spend a day on the water discussing future events and reflect on what all Texas has to offer.
Video.title: "Lonestar Redfish"

Video.summary: Capt. Blair heads up to Steinhatchee after getting a call from local tournament angler Jay Andrew. The reds have been popping off and so the two head out in search.
Video.title: "Top Water Reds with Jay Andrew"

Video.summary: The second day in Steinhatchee, Capt. Blair & Jay finally find where all the reds got off too, and I mean ALL the reds. This is one of the craziest sights on the show yet.
Video.title: "The School"

Video.summary: Highlights from Capt. Blair's recent travels.
Video.title: "Bits & Bites"

Video.summary: While up in Alaska, the crew caught more fish than we had time to show so here's another look at some of the fish that were caught on the Alaskan trip.
Video.title: "Alaska Bits & Bites"

Video.summary: The Green Way Outdoors team heads to Alaska to target sockeye salmon. The beautiful color of these harvested fillets will blow your mind.
Video.title: "Alaska Sockeye Salmon"

Video.summary: Kyle Green and Jeff Hutchinson head to Maryland to bow-fish for an invasive, toothy fish called the snakehead. They learn how this fish, a native of Asia, made its way to the United States. They also learn from the locals, despite its appearance, it is one tasty fish.
Video.title: "The Snakehead Fish"

Video.summary: Kyle Green meets up with some friends at the Idaho Fish and Game Department to ice fish for cutthroat trout. Looking to test the results of previous restocking efforts, they'll be heading to some of the most remote lakes in the state only accessible by snowmobile.
Video.title: "Remote Mountain Ice Fishing"

Video.summary: Kyle Green and Jeff Hutchinson head to Northern Maine to hunt for moose and learn about the conservation of this species which is under attack by winter ticks. Can reducing moose numbers be the key to saving the local moose population from this deadly parasite?
Video.title: "The Maine Moose"

Video.summary: Earlier in the year, Phillip Culpepper experiences a rough go at hunting Osceola turkeys in southern Florida. Here, he returns for a come-back trip. Turkey hunting requires patience and persistence. So, never give up on that bird.
Video.title: "Hens Walk Him Right To Us | Sweet Osceola Redemption"

Image.alt: "Hens Walk Him Right To Us | Sweet Osceola Redemption"
"Hens Walk Him Right To Us | Sweet Osceola Redemption"
"Hens Walk Him Right To Us | Sweet Osceola Redemption"

Video.summary: The conditions are just right and the guys have some of the best turkey hunting encounters of the season.
Video.title: "We Had Gobblers Everywhere!! | Turkey Hunting The Hills"

Image.alt: "We Had Gobblers Everywhere!! | Turkey Hunting The Hills"
"We Had Gobblers Everywhere!! | Turkey Hunting The Hills"
"We Had Gobblers Everywhere!! | Turkey Hunting The Hills"

Video.summary: Realtree's David Blanton continues his unbelievable year of self filming turkeys as he solo hunts Illinois and Kansas before he heads out west.
Video.title: "Solo Hunting Illinois And Kansas"

Video.summary: Witness a truly epic day on the water when Capt. Justin and Meredith find a secluded slice of beach teeming with redfish biting virtually everything. Topwater plugs, rusty flies and a live well full of bait make for an experience no redfish angler would forget
Video.title: "Epic Redfish"

Video.summary: When your gut tells you to do something different than what’s in front of you, do you listen? - Capt. Justin and Meredith listen, and find that success comes in many forms. And it turns out that success can be really tasty, too!
Video.title: "Best Go With Plan B"

Video.summary: It’s opening day of grouper season and, for Capt. Justin Leake and one of his longtime fishing buddies, that means a trip offshore is in order. And what better way to break in a new boat than heading to some reefs and filling the cooler with one of the Gulf of Mexico’s most popular fish?
Video.title: "Grouper Open"

Video.summary: There’s nothing like a change in weather conditions to wreck a perfectly good fishing plan, and that’s exactly what Capt. Justin Leake and his cousin encounter when December turns unseasonably warm. It’s a grey morning with thick fog so Justin and Capt. Brent Berry won’t be heading offshore right away as planned. Instead, Justin turns to his Humminbird CoastMaster charts to pinpoint a near shore artificial reef just five minutes from the St. Andrews Pass, where the anglers will do a little fishing until the fog burns off. Capt. Leake opts to send a jig to the bottom and he’s not very picky about the one that gets tied on. “When fishing reefs, the specific jig doesn’t matter because it’s all about the presentation,” he says. “When you’re sitting on top of a wreck, break out the ‘junk jigs’ – they get bit just fine.” And that proves to be the case as Justin and Brent enjoy non-stop battles against amberjack, red snapper and bonita. And with a bite this good, there’s no reason to go anywhere else! Also, we take a look at the United States Coast Guard Auxiliary’s new paddle craft safety initiative.
Video.title: "Foggy Bottom Fishing"

Video.summary: Dan Cabela joins the relocation of one of Africa’s most endangered Big Cats to an ecosystem where they have been absent for almost 100 years. Also known as the fastest land mammal - the Cheetah.
Video.title: "Restoring An Ecosystem"

Video.summary: Realtree's David Blanton and Turkeys for Tomorrow (TFT) sweepstakes winner Jaryd Hurst hunt South Texas Rios. The two are hunting with Legends of the Fall's Mike McFerrin, and his daughter, Georgia Kate, on their ranch in Texas.
Video.title: "March Rios Are Falling | A South Texas Double"

Image.alt: "March Rios Are Falling | A South Texas Double"
"March Rios Are Falling | A South Texas Double"
"March Rios Are Falling | A South Texas Double"

Video.summary: Low turkey population densities and the rocky, steep terrain of New York State's Adirondack Mountains create a unique spring turkey hunting challenge only found in this region of the country. It's not always easy to find wild turkeys here, but when you can, there is always the chance that this bird has never been hunted making success particularly special.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: Jennifer Brooks has spent her life answering the call to serve. From flying Blackhawk helicopters on multiple combat missions during two tours in Iraq to now serving as an Air Medical Pilot and first responder, her story is one of courage, sacrifice, and humility. In this episode of Storytellers, we join Jennifer in the field for a hunt that offers a rare moment to slow down, reflect, and honor a life dedicated to protecting others.
Video.title: "Bucks for the Brave: Women's Hunt"

Video.summary: In this episode Slade takes Bentley on his very first duck hunt. Slade also gets to take a trip to duck hunting paradise with some great buddies of his. This episode is all about having a great time with great friends.
Video.title: "Duck Land Man"

Video.summary: Watch as Lori tags her first turkey of the season as well as the daily grind and comments from the office in McComb, Mississippi. The ladies in the office isn’t too fond of turkey season until it’s their turn.
Video.title: "Daily Life"

Video.summary: In this episode, we take you to historic Saint Francisville, Louisiana. We closed on a couple of real estate properties in this area and want to show you why this area is so unique from a recreational standpoint. This place holds the “old south” feel that is ever so fleeting. We hunt on a property I sold to a client last year in Saint Francisville and manage to get a beautiful longbearded turkey on the ground. This episode is one you definitely don’t want to miss.
Video.title: "Hunting Next To A Haunted House"+

Video.summary: While getting ready for the 2023 turkey season, we couldn't help but look back at some of the best "off-the-roost" turkey hunts from our video vault. Check out these Team Realtree turkey hunts.
Video.title: "The Best Off-the-Roost Turkey Hunts"

Video.summary: Phillip Culpepper and the Spring Thunder crew take Bryson Crawford on a mission to get his first Osceola of the year. A turkey surprises them while easing through a thick jungle of brush.
Video.title: "Hunting Stubborn Osceola Turkeys | Turkey Hunting in the Jungle | "

Image.alt: "Hunting Stubborn Osceola Turkeys | Turkey Hunting in the Jungle | "
"Hunting Stubborn Osceola Turkeys | Turkey Hunting in the Jungle | "
"Hunting Stubborn Osceola Turkeys | Turkey Hunting in the Jungle | "

Video.summary: In 2010, Amberly Snyder’s life changed forever when an accident left her paralyzed from the waist-down. Her comeback story not unlike something you’d see in a movie…in fact it inspired one. Disabled Outdoorsmen USA contacted TTHA and set up this hunt and we were fortunate enough to be able to capture just some of Amberly’s story and her harvest of a beautiful Axis buck at the G2 Ranch in the spring of 2022.
Video.title: "Walk, Ride, Rodeo…Hunt"

Video.summary: We join Blake Barnett alongside hunter Jimmy Reynolds as they take part in the 2nd Annual Pierce Dutton Memorial Hunt. This meaningful whitetail hunt is made possible by the great folks at Disabled Outdoorsmen. Jimmy settles in at the G2 Ranch in South Texas, where prime whitetail country and a shared passion for the outdoors set the stage for an unforgettable hunt.
Video.title: "Disabled Outdoorsmen"

Video.summary: We are blessed for the opportunity to follow along the guys from Trinity Oaks for Bucks for the Brave. The men and women that served in our armed services and as first responders, had jobs that required the, to be willing to sacrifice their own lives every day, in order to protect or save someone else's. Not many of us can say that, nor understand what that truly means. The things they've had to see, and the sacrifices they've made in their daily lives, can have a profound impact on them. Trinity Oaks' Bucks for the Brave platform allows the loved ones and communities that support these heroes to share their stories and unite us all in honoring and recognizing their service to our great nation. We are proud to continue to be a part of this incredible program, getting these heroes in the outdoors for the hunt of a lifetime.
Video.title: "Trinity Oaks - Bucks for the Brave"

Video.summary: We are blessed today to hunt with Cole Dutton for the Inaugural Pierce Dutton Memorial Hunt. We are honored to spend a weekend with Cole and his family at the G2 Ranch. Disabled Outdoorsman has played a huge part in getting those less fortunate outdoors. We are truly blessed to be able to follow along and capture these great moments.
Video.title: "Cole Dutton"
